title: Rebind v0.5.39 metadata after workflow correction merge
rawUserRequest: 继续扫清发布前障碍；合并流程修复后，重新绑定 v0.5.39 发布元数据，完成完整 PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步后再发布。

declaredIntent.summary: 将 v0.5.39 冻结证据重新绑定到包含 PR #315 的 canonical main。

intent.problem: PR #315 changed the merged tree, making existing v0.5.39 freeze sourceTree and archive digests stale.
constraints: No tag or Release mutation in this Work Item.
No budget-only Work Item; reserve archive growth here.
intent.rationale: Regenerate source-bound release metadata from the merged canonical main before the formal release workflow is retried.

problemStatement: The merged workflow correction changed the canonical source tree, so the prior v0.5.39 metadata is stale and release preflight correctly blocks publication.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Freeze metadata matches merged canonical source tree and archive
